overall.description: A cinematic first-person walk through a desolate coastal landscape in a high-end game engine, transitioning from an open beach with ocean views into a narrow rocky canyon. The scene features atmospheric fog, dramatic overcast lighting, abandoned wooden ritual structures, and towering rock formations.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal beach path with ocean view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sandy shore toward distant rock formations and wooden posts

entered.detail: tall rocky cliff face forming the left boundary of the path
wet sand trail winding through the coastal rocks
calm sea visible along the right side of the path
clumps of brown dried grass growing between rocks
large rock towers and arches visible in the distance
tall wooden poles with hanging banners standing in the path ahead

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a desolate coastal beach with a sandy path winding between a rocky cliff face on the left and the ocean on the right. Dry grass patches dot the terrain, and in the distance, tall wooden ritual posts with banners mark the way toward large rock formations.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky shoreline with wooden ritual structures

events.description: passing the wooden ritual posts with tattered banners on the left
passing wooden platform steps built into the rocks on the right

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path past wooden ritual structures and platforms

entered.detail: weathered wooden steps and platforms built against the rock face
singular tall rock spire rising above the surrounding terrain
natural stone archway visible between rock towers

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past the wooden ritual posts and continues along the rocky shore, passing weathered wooden platform stairs on the right. The ocean disappears from view as the path curves inland toward impressive rock formations including a tall monolith and natural arch.

scene_state.functional_zone: open rocky canyon with scattered boulders

events.description: transitioning from coastal environment to desert canyon landscape
approaching the narrow entrance to a canyon passage ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through open rocky terrain scattered with boulders toward a canyon entrance

entered.detail: flat rock outcropping forming a natural platform on the right
massive standalone rock pillar dominating the center view
rocks and stones scattered across the sandy ground
narrow vertical gap between rock walls marking the canyon entry

segments.scene_description: The environment shifts to a desert canyon floor scattered with boulders and dominated by a massive rock monolith. The camera moves steadily forward, leaving the wooden structures behind, approaching a narrow gap between rock walls that marks the entrance to a deeper canyon passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow canyon passage with high rock walls

events.description: entering the narrow canyon corridor with walls rising on both sides

agents.ego_description: proceeding through the confined canyon passage toward the light visible at the far end

entered.detail: tall canyon wall now forming the right boundary of the narrow passage
strip of sky visible through the narrow opening high above

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a narrow canyon corridor with rock walls rising closely on both sides, creating an enclosed passage. The sky is visible only as a thin strip overhead, with light visible at the distant end of the canyon as the path continues forward through the confined space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open, desolate coastline into the claustrophobic depths of a narrow rock canyon. It begins on a sandy beach path winding between a rocky cliff and the ocean, passing dry grass and tall wooden ritual posts with banners. As the camera moves past these structures and weathered platform stairs, the ocean disappears from view and the path curves inland toward a towering monolith and a natural arch. The environment then shifts into a boulder-strewn desert floor, moving steadily away from the wooden ruins and toward a tight gap in the stone. Finally, the camera enters a confined canyon corridor where the rock walls rise closely on both sides, leaving only a thin strip of sky overhead as the path leads toward a distant light.
